examples: He got into some trouble down in Jumby Village.
Jumby Bay said it came up with the "Together Package" because its employees were getting so many requests from guests to take their pictures.
In May, Jumby Bay, a Rosewood Resort in Antigua in the Caribbean began offering a "Together Package" for couples that includes a two-hour shoot with a professional photographer.
The well-to-do folks who are shelling out big bucks for a night at Rosewood Mansion on Turtle Creek in Dallas or Jumby Bay on Antigua, can easily afford it.
